mapper.sql: s.id, s.site, s.sku, s.product_name, s.sku_level, CASE WHEN d.id IS NOT NULL THEN d.lowest_price ELSE s.our_lowest_price END AS our_lowest_price, CASE WHEN d.id IS NOT NULL THEN d.tracking_price ELSE s.tracking_price END AS tracking_price, CASE WHEN d.id IS NOT NULL THEN d.tracking_profit_margin ELSE s.tracking_profit_margin END AS tracking_profit_margin, CASE WHEN d.id IS NOT NULL THEN d.floor_price ELSE s.floor_price END AS floor_price, s.return_rate, s.sales_3d, s.sales_7d, s.sales_30d, s.sales_90d, s.max_monthly_sales, s.overseas_stock, s.overseas_stock_age_days, s.stock_sales_ratio, s.estimated_replenish_qty, s.brand_code, s.operator_name, CASE WHEN d.id IS NOT NULL THEN d.oe_number ELSE s.oe_number END AS oe_number, s.presale_url, s.sold_url, CASE WHEN d.id IS NOT NULL THEN d.remark ELSE s.remark END AS remark, s.calc_time

id, site, sku, product_name, sku_level, our_lowest_price, tracking_price, tracking_profit_margin, floor_price, return_rate, sales_3d, sales_7d, sales_30d, sales_90d, max_monthly_sales, overseas_stock, overseas_stock_age_days, stock_sales_ratio, estimated_replenish_qty, brand_code, operator_name, oe_number, presale_url, sold_url, remark, calc_time
mapper.select:
select distinct t.`${column}` from ebay_price_tracking_snapshot t where t.current_flag = 1 and t.`${column}` is not null and t.`${column}` != ''
and t.`${column}` like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by t.`${column}` limit 50
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ebay_price_tracking_snapshot ( site, sku, product_name, sku_level, our_lowest_price, tracking_price, tracking_profit_margin, floor_price, return_rate, sales_3d, sales_7d, sales_30d, sales_90d, max_monthly_sales, overseas_stock, overseas_stock_age_days, stock_sales_ratio, estimated_replenish_qty, brand_code, operator_name, oe_number, presale_url, sold_url, remark, calc_time, batch_no, current_flag ) VALUES
( #{i.site}, #{i.sku}, #{i.productName}, #{i.skuLevel}, #{i.ourLowestPrice}, #{i.trackingPrice}, #{i.trackingProfitMargin}, #{i.floorPrice}, #{i.returnRate}, #{i.sales3d}, #{i.sales7d}, #{i.sales30d}, #{i.sales90d}, #{i.maxMonthlySales}, #{i.overseasStock}, #{i.overseasStockAgeDays}, #{i.stockSalesRatio}, #{i.estimatedReplenishQty}, #{i.brandCode}, #{i.operatorName}, #{i.oeNumber}, #{i.presaleUrl}, #{i.soldUrl}, #{i.remark}, NOW(), #{batchNo}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE ebay_price_tracking_snapshot SET current_flag = CASE WHEN batch_no = #{batchNo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

UPDATE ebay_price_tracking_snapshot t JOIN ebay_replenishment_snapshot r ON r.site = t.site AND r.sku = t.sku SET t.estimated_replenish_qty = r.max_monthly_replenish_qty WHERE t.current_flag = 1 AND r.current_flag = 1 AND r.max_monthly_replenish_qty IS NOT NULL
